title: Custom Nucleic Acid Extraction and Bead Clean Up
author: Opentrons
materials: This protocol automates the bead-based purification of nucleic acids from up to 96 cellular samples using a custom workflow. Links: * [Invitrogen DNA Binding Beads for MagMAX-96 DNA Multi-Sample Kit from ThermoFisher catalog number 4489112](https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/4489112?SID=srch-srp-4489112#/4489112?SID=srch-srp-4489112) This protocol was developed to perform the following steps: Bead binding, two wash steps, allow beads to air dry, followed by elution and transfer of the eluate to a fresh PCR plate.
Bead drying- pause to let beads air dry.

steps.title: Binding- add binding buffer to input...
steps.instruction: Binding- add binding buffer to input samples in wells of deep well plate on the Magnetic Module, mix, engage magnets, transfer supernatants to liquid waste in reservoir A3-A12.

steps.title: Wash1- transfer 70 percent ethanol from...
steps.instruction: Wash1- transfer 70 percent ethanol from 50 mL tubes to wells of the deep well plate on the Magnetic Module, mix, engage magnets, transfer supernatants to the liquid waste tubes A3 and B3.

steps.title: Wash2 - transfer 70 percent ethanol...
steps.instruction: Wash2 - transfer 70 percent ethanol from 50 mL tubes to wells of the deep well plate on the Magnetic Module, mix, engage magnets, transfer supernatants to the liquid waste in reservoir A3-A12.

steps.title: Elution- transfer TE to wells of...
steps.instruction: Elution- transfer TE to wells of deep well plate on the Magnetic Module, mix, engage magnets, transfer eluate to elution plate in deck slot 1.
